stories.title: Create ensureConversation RPC for atomic conversation creation
acceptance: SQL function ensure_copilot_conversation(p_id UUID, p_user_id UUID, p_org_id UUID, p_title TEXT) created
Uses INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING then SELECT to return existing or new record
Returns conversation record with id, user_id, org_id, title, created_at, updated_at
Migration file created and applies without errors

stories.title: Refactor useCopilotChat to accept conversationId and remove main session auto-load
acceptance: useCopilotChat accepts optional conversationId in options — if provided, loads that conversation's messages on mount
getMainSession() call removed from mount effect — no longer auto-creates main session
Hook exposes ensureConversation() method that calls the RPC and sets conversationId
conversationIdRef uses useLayoutEffect for immediate sync (not deferred useEffect)
Existing message persistence continues to work with the new conversationId flow

stories.title: Fix CopilotPage conversation routing to create DB records
acceptance: On mount with URL ID: calls ensureConversation RPC to create/get DB record before any message can be sent
On mount without URL ID: generates UUID, calls ensureConversation, redirects to /copilot/{uuid}
startNewChat() generates UUID, creates DB record via RPC, then navigates
No more setConversationId() calls that bypass DB — all paths go through ensureConversation
initializedForUrl ref resets properly on URL changes to allow re-navigation

stories.title: Fix CopilotContext to coordinate conversation lifecycle with new RPC
acceptance: loadConversation() calls ensureConversation RPC (create-if-missing) before loading messages
setConversationId() also calls ensureConversation RPC to ensure DB record exists
startNewChat() creates DB record for new conversation via RPC
sendMessage() verifies conversationId is persisted (isConversationPersisted=true) before sending
autonomousCopilot messages clear properly when conversation changes

stories.title: Fix conversation switching flow end-to-end
acceptance: Clicking a conversation in History navigates to /copilot/{id} and loads its messages
Current messages clear before loading new conversation (no flash of old content)
Autonomous copilot messages clear on conversation switch
Back/forward browser navigation works between conversations
Active conversation highlighted in History section

stories.title: Add conversation title auto-generation from first message
acceptance: After first user message: title set to first 50 chars of message content
Title updated in copilot_conversations table via supabase update
Conversation history query cache invalidated after title update
History section shows meaningful title instead of 'New Conversation'

stories.title: Optimize useConversationHistory to use count aggregation
acceptance: Message count uses aggregate query instead of fetching all messages
Last message preview fetches only 1 user message per conversation (not all)
Bandwidth reduced by >90% for users with many conversations
History section still shows correct message counts and previews

stories.title: Create useCopilotIntegrationStatus hook for real integration status
acceptance: Hook aggregates status from useHubSpotIntegration, useFathomIntegration, and user_settings
Returns Integration[] matching CopilotRightPanel's interface (id, name, connected, settingsUrl)
Includes HubSpot, Fathom, Slack, Calendar integration status
Uses React Query with 60s stale time to avoid excessive re-fetching

stories.title: Wire real integration status to ConnectedSection in Copilot
acceptance: Copilot.tsx imports useCopilotIntegrationStatus and passes result as integrations prop
ConnectedSection shows accurate connected/disconnected state per integration
Connected count badge shows real number of active integrations
Clicking disconnected integration navigates to its settings page

stories.title: Add user-visible persistence error handling with toast feedback
acceptance: Message persistence failures show toast.error instead of console.warn
FK constraint violations auto-create conversation via ensureConversation then retry
User sees warning if message may not be saved (non-blocking, doesn't interrupt chat)

stories.title: Fix edge cases: deletion, org switching, loading states, timestamps
acceptance: Deleting current conversation navigates to a new conversation
Org switching clears conversation state and starts fresh
Loading state shown while conversation is being created/loaded
Tool call timestamps persist startedAt from metadata, not new Date()

parallelGroups.name: Hook + Page + Context refactor (parallel after COPILOT-001)
parallelGroups.reason: Different files, all depend only on COPILOT-001 RPC

parallelGroups.name: History polish (parallel after Phase 1)
parallelGroups.reason: Independent features building on Phase 1 foundation

agent-bravo.role: Connected section + history optimization (Phase 3 + partial Phase 2)
